_doc: Plans whose materials_url is fronted by Cloudflare/Akamai/etc. and blocks GitHub Actions Azure datacenter IPs. These run on local Windows Task Scheduler; the GHA daily-pipeline workflow skips them. Anything outside this list runs from GHA. Verified by `python -m scripts.probe_scrape --all` from a hosted runner on 2026-05-04 (run 67284... at SHA a03f733).
_how_it_works: pipeline.py loads this file and consults it in two ways: (1) when GITHUB_ACTIONS=true, the listed plan IDs are excluded from the default plan set; (2) when --local-only is passed, ONLY the listed plan IDs are processed. Explicit positional plan_ids on the CLI bypass both filters.
